Description: Customer drawer always showed the same name regardless of which customer was clicked.
Root cause: Name read via find() over ALL items, not the clicked customer.
Fix: Name+phone read from the clicked customer's own items.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Unresolved tab. 2. Click Customer A, note drawer header name+phone. 3. Close, click Customer B; header shows B. 4. Repeat 3-4 customers.
Expected result (fixed): Drawer header name+phone always match the clicked row.

Description: Listen/Transcript could play a different call than the item came from.
Root cause: On call-id load failure it fell back to the customer's latest call.
Fix: Fallback only when item has no call id, shown with an amber banner; else evidence excerpt.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Open an item with a recording; Listen; confirm correct call, no banner. 2. Open a call item with no linked call; amber banner appears.
Expected result (fixed): Transcript/recording always same customer; fallback clearly labelled.

Description: Browse all conversations then clicking a call did nothing.
Root cause: Report fetch keyed off the item, not the clicked call.
Fix: Drilling into a call fetches that call's report.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Open call drawer; Browse all N conversations. 2. Click a different call; detail loads. 3. Back, pick another; updates.
Expected result (fixed): Each drilled call loads its own report.

Description: A Sales item resolved its call against Service conversations.
Root cause: Conversation lookup defaulted to global service dept.
Fix: Lookup uses the item's own department.
Steps to reproduce: 1. On a Sales item open drawer; confirm sales conversations. 2. Repeat on a Service item.

Description: An item could appear twice and inflate repeat-caller count.
Root cause: Paged fetch had no dedup; boundary row fetched twice.
Fix: Items de-duplicated by id across pages.
Steps to reproduce: 1. On a large multi-page rooftop, scroll the full queue. 2. Confirm no duplicate rows.

Description: One-time contact labelled an N-time repeat caller.
Root cause: Counted raw items, not distinct conversations.
Fix: Counts distinct conversations/calls per customer.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Customer whose items came from one call/email -> badge x1. 2. Customer with separate calls -> true count.

Description: Panel could keep a previous item's/customer's state.
Root cause: Drawers not keyed by id.
Fix: Both drawers remount per item/customer.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Rapidly open different customers then items in succession. 2. Confirm no carry-over.

Description: Searching a customer not in the queue selected the wrong one.
Root cause: Search built from global map, not scoped queue.
Fix: Candidates come from the scoped queue items.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Queue search, type a name/phone. 2. Click a result.

Description: Customer name/phone degraded to Customer/blank.
Root cause: Later sparse duplicate overwrote a good value.
Fix: Merge-fill instead of last-write-wins.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Load, refresh, switch depts and back.

Description: View full customer profile button did nothing.
Root cause: Linked to a route that doesn't exist in the iframe.
Fix: Removed the non-working CTA.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Open customer drawer; scroll to footer.

Description: Customer drawer count didn't match the queue (showed all departments).
Root cause: Drawer counted items across all departments; queue is department-scoped.
Fix: Drawer open/resolved/repeat sets scoped to the active department.
Steps to reproduce: 1. On Sales, find a customer with both Sales and Service items. 2. Note the queue card count. 3. Open the drawer; OPEN ITEMS stat+list must show the same count, not a larger all-dept number. 4. Switch to Service and repeat.
Expected result (fixed): Drawer count = queue count for the active department.
Screenshot ref: screenshots/A11.png (drawer OPEN ITEMS vs queue card count)

Description: Resolved/Incorrect disappeared after refresh or dept switch.
Root cause: Session-only state.
Fix: Read from the DB (completed items with a console resolution).
Steps to reproduce: 1. Resolve an item, refresh -> still under Resolved. 2. Flag Incorrect, refresh -> still there. 3. Switch depts and back.
Expected result (fixed): Both persist across refresh and dept switch.

Description: Count reverted on refresh after resolving.
Root cause: Total computed from a partial page.
Fix: Pending fetch paginates the full backlog.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Resolve several items, note count drops. 2. Refresh.

Description: Sales/Service needed separate deep-links.
Root cause: serviceType not canonical.
Fix: serviceType is canonical; toggle writes it back.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Load ?serviceType=service -> Service active. 2. Toggle to Sales -> URL updates. 3. Deep-link both.
Expected result (fixed): URL and active tab stay in sync.

Description: Service tab showed Sales items and vice-versa.
Root cause: Dept derived from shared intent code.
Fix: Per-item dept from service_type.
Steps to reproduce: 1. In Service spot-check items are service. 2. In Sales all sales.

Description: Address bar didn't sync with the toggle (iframe).
Root cause: No host<->iframe bridge.
Fix: postMessage bridge; host must apply HOST-INTEGRATION.md.
Steps to reproduce: 1. With host patch, toggle -> parent URL updates. 2. Without it, iframe works but address bar won't change.
Expected result (fixed): Address bar syncs once host patched.

Description: No recording available when a recording existed.
Root cause: Recording URL was relative; player rejected it.
Fix: Absolute URL via same-origin proxy.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Open an item with a recording; Listen.

Description: SMS/chat items not showing or mis-channelled.
Root cause: SMS channel misclassification.
Fix: SMS classification fixed; thread attached.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Channel = SMS -> SMS items appear with thread.

Description: Queue not ordered by urgency.
Root cause: No breach-based sort.
Fix: Sort by longest SLA breach first.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Confirm top of queue is the most-overdue customer.

Description: Couldn't search by phone number.
Root cause: No phone search.
Fix: Phone search ignoring formatting and +1.

Description: Callbacks chip missed items; Listen wrongly disabled.
Root cause: Chip matched wrong intents; Listen gated on channel.
Fix: Chip matches all callback intents; Listen enabled when call resolvable.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Click Callbacks chip -> all callback items. 2. Item with a call has Listen enabled.

Description: At-risk tagging/filter removed (product call).
Root cause: N/A.
Fix: Removed At-risk chip + filter.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Confirm no At-risk chip anywhere.

Description: Manager/My-queue toggle removed.
Root cause: N/A.
Fix: Removed the scope toggle.
Steps to reproduce: 1. Confirm no Manager/My-queue toggle.

Description: Resolver identity for auto-assign.
Root cause: Token carries no user identity.
Fix: Resolver from session identity (userId/userEmail).
Steps to reproduce: 1. Resolve an item -> acting user recorded as owner.

Description: customer_id can fall back to lead_id; same person may split.
Root cause: Backend id semantics.
Fix: Not changed - needs BE confirmation.
Steps to reproduce: N/A - product/backend decision.
Screenshot ref: screenshots/C1.png (two cards one person, if seen)

Description: Repeat caller is a same-session proxy, not a lifetime count.
Root cause: Backend exposes no call-history count.
Fix: Not changed - confirm or add BE count.
Steps to reproduce: N/A - product/backend decision.

Description: Host<->iframe URL sync needs converse-ai to apply HOST-INTEGRATION.md.
Root cause: Host-side change outside this repo.
Fix: Handover doc provided.
Steps to reproduce: N/A - host team action.
